justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including "Thursday next week" and specific dates and times.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative times and dates when the initial requests were unavailable, always offering relevant options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent had one slightly redundant API call when checking for availability on Friday, June 5th, after the user had already asked for it in the previous turn.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with the agent consistently apologizing for unavailability and offering clear alternatives.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context throughout the conversation, intelligently expanding the search for available slots without re-asking for information.
